parameters.space: Size of the world — intimate room at low, infinite cathedral at high
parameters.shimmer: Crystalline sparkle — natural reverb at low, cascading harmonics at high
parameters.smear: Time blurring — sharp attacks at low, everything dissolves into texture at high
parameters.warmth: Tonal color — bright and airy at low, dark and amber at high
parameters.drift: Evolving movement — still and frozen at low, slowly breathing at high
parameters.sustain: How long things ring — short events at low, infinite at high
parameters.scatter: Grain density and stereo spread — few focused grains at low, many scattered wide at high
parameters.mix: Blend between dry signal and effect
